translations: O mankind O mankind Indeed, We created you from
a male and a female and We made you nations and tribes
that you may know one another Indeed (the) most noble of you near Allah
(is the) most righteous of you Indeed Allah (is) All-Knower All-Aware
puzzle.hint: A powerful verse about human equality and the true measure of nobility being piety, not lineage or status
puzzle.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰكُم مِّن ذَكَرٍۢ وَأُنثَىٰ وَجَعَلْنَـٰكُمْ شُعُوبًۭا وَقَبَآئِلَ لِتَعَارَفُوٓا۟ ۚ إِنَّ أَكْرَمَكُمْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَتْقَىٰكُمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌۭ
puzzle.verseEn: O mankind, indeed We have created you from male and female and made you peoples and tribes that you may know one another. Indeed, the most noble of you in the sight of Allāh is the most righteous of you. Indeed, Allāh is Knowing and Aware.
